name: DeepSeek-V3 671B
archDisplay: MoE transformer, 671B total / 37B active — DeepSeekMoE + MLA + multi-token prediction, auxiliary-loss-free load balancing
note: 671B/37B MoE trained on 14.8T tokens for ~$5.6M (2.788M H800 GPU-hours); matched GPT-4o/Claude 3.5 quality at a fraction of the cost.
tpsNote: 671B total params vastly exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB even at 4-bit; requires a multi-GPU cluster or heavy CPU/RAM offload
